metadata.title: Contoso: Intro to Copilot Agents
metadata.description: Build your first declarative agent on the Contoso reference stack and ground it in a product catalog.

item.content_markdown:
## Overview

This partner lab from **Contoso Copilot Labs** walks you through building your
first declarative agent and grounding it in the Contoso product catalog.

## What you'll build

- A declarative agent with a focused set of instructions
- A knowledge source over the Contoso catalog
- A tested conversation starter

## Steps

1. Create a new agent in Copilot Studio.
2. Add the catalog knowledge source.
3. Add three conversation starters and test them.

> Syndicated from Contoso Copilot Labs via the content feed.
